zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf於1477年出生在英國藍卡爾阿斯普爾時，他的父親John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggf30歲，母親Kari Johnson Hougdahl28歲。他於1500年與Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿斯普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1531年9月22日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿斯普爾享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾維根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf于1477年出生在英国藍卡爾阿斯普爾时，他的父亲John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggf30岁，母亲Kari Johnson Hougdahl28岁。他于1500年与Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish在英国英格兰藍卡爾阿斯普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1531年9月22日在英国英格兰藍卡爾阿斯普爾享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾維根。

nameMeanings.name: Goodloe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: Rauf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf was born in 1477, in Aspull, Lancashire, England, his father, John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggf, was 30 and his mother, Kari Johnson Hougdahl, was 28. He married Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish in 1500, in Aspull, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 22 September 1531, in Aspull, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Wigan, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf est né en 1477, à Aspull, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggf, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Kari Johnson Hougdahl, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish en 1500, à Aspull, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 septembre 1531, à Aspull, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Wigan, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf 1477 in Aspull, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggf 30 und seine Mutter Kari Johnson Hougdahl 28. Er hat 1500 in Aspull, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. September 1531 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Aspull, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wigan, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf è nato il nel 1477 nel Aspull, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggf, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Kari Johnson Hougdahl, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish nel 1500, nel Aspull, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 settembre 1531, nel Aspull, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Wigan, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggfが1477年にイギリスランカシュアイアアスプウルで生まれた時，父John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggfは30歳，母Kari Johnson Hougdahlは28歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアスプウルでLady Anne Elizabeth Standishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1531年9月22日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアスプウルで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウィガンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf(이)가 1477년 영국 랭카실르 아스풀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggf(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Kari Johnson Hougdahl(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 아스풀에서 Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1531년 9월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 아스풀에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 위건에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf nasceu em 1477, em Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggf, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Kari Johnson Hougdahl, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish em 1500, em Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1531, em Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Wigan, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf родился в 1477 г. в местности аспулл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggf было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Kari Johnson Hougdahl, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish в 1500 г. в местности аспулл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 сентября 1531 г. в местности аспулл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности виган, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf nació en 1477, en Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Gidlow or Goodloe 14th ggf, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Kari Johnson Hougdahl, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish en 1500, en Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1531, en Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Wigan, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
